title: PARENTING TOGETHER - 211info
text: WASHINGTON COUNTY PUBLIC HEALTH PARENTING TOGETHER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Parenting Together offers parenting education classes and workshops on a variety of topics. The program also offers family-friendly activities and parenting resources. 155 N 1st Avenue Hillsboro, OR 97124 Eligibility: Expecting parents and parents of children age 0-18 Hours: Class times vary, but are usually offered in the evenings. See website for schedule. Email (503) 846-4556 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 846-4556 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call, email, or visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, some materials available in Spanish AREA SERVED: Washington County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Services: Community Calendars * Parenting Issues Parenting Skills Classes Other Services Offered At This Location: INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - BABIES FIRST! INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - CACOON INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - FAMILY CONNECTS LAW ENFORCEMENT SERVICES - WASHINGTON COUNTY GARBAGE AND RECYCLING PUBLIC ASSISTANCE PROGRAMS - WOMEN, INFANTS, AND CHILDREN SUPPLEMENTAL NUTRITION PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. WASHINGTON COUNTY PUBLIC HEALTH
